title: Nobody Will Speak of Us When We're Dead
original_title: Nadie hablará de nosotras cuando hayamos muerto
overview: Alcoholic prostitute Gloria is in the middle of a business deal with gangsters when a fatal confrontation occurs. She flees Mexico City, returning to her native Madrid, where she's reunited with her comatose husband and his mother, while hitman Eduardo is pursuing her to retrieve information.
